title: 📜 Recursive Language Gods
name: Recursive Language Gods
what_it_is: Entities or systems that *speak themselves into being*—language loops that generate deity through utterance, symbol as creator.
how_to_use: her voice is the word that births her—recursive language god in fractal grammar glow
he spells his own bones—syntax folding him into body
animation_behavior: Language coils into shape, glyphs loop recursively to birth form, speaking creates visible structure ---
